gaps.gap: No Montgomery production launch authorization or release approval exists.
gaps.reason: No Montgomery production launch authorization or release approval exists.
gaps.dependency: Release governance approval, launch owner, activation/change record
gaps.recommendedResolution: Record explicit production authorization with approver, scope, window, protected-boundary attestations, and go/no-go authority.

gaps.gap: Montgomery artifacts are package-scoped only and are not wired into runtime county package loading.
gaps.reason: Montgomery artifacts are package-scoped only and are not wired into runtime county package loading.
gaps.dependency: Authorized implementation change touching county package loading only after approval
gaps.recommendedResolution: Integrate approved Montgomery county package using existing county-selection patterns without Supabase, historical, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, or unrelated runtime changes.

gaps.gap: Existing registry artifact is not a production registry record.
gaps.reason: Existing registry artifact is not a production registry record.
gaps.dependency: Registry owner approval and production registry change plan
gaps.recommendedResolution: Create production registry entry only after authorization; validate rollback removal/disable path.

gaps.gap: County selection, awareness scope, route-watch, alerts, and report ownership implications have not been production-validated for Montgomery.
gaps.reason: County selection, awareness scope, route-watch, alerts, and report ownership implications have not been production-validated for Montgomery.
gaps.dependency: Runtime integration plus containment validation fixtures
gaps.recommendedResolution: Validate county selection resolves Montgomery only when selected and that awareness, alerts, route-watch, and reports remain county-contained.

gaps.gap: Montgomery assets are intentionally not placed in data/ and cannot be consumed by production paths.
gaps.reason: Montgomery assets are intentionally not placed in data/ and cannot be consumed by production paths.
gaps.recommendedResolution: Promote only approved Montgomery artifacts to production-consumable location after authorization; preserve package provenance.

gaps.gap: Pre-launch audits, containment checks, regression checks, and Liberty baseline comparisons have not been executed after runtime integration.
gaps.reason: Pre-launch audits, containment checks, regression checks, and Liberty baseline comparisons have not been executed after runtime integration.
gaps.recommendedResolution: Run artifact, dependency, containment, regression, Liberty-baseline, protected-boundary, registry, and rollback validations after authorized integration.

gaps.gap: V580 observation plan exists but has not been executed.
gaps.reason: V580 observation plan exists but has not been executed.
gaps.dependency: Operations monitoring, daily review cadence, escalation owner
gaps.recommendedResolution: Run a 7-calendar-day observation window after implementation validation, tracking protected boundaries, issue triage, containment, rollback triggers, and unauthorized mutation checks.
gaps.estimatedReadinessImpact: Required to move from implementation-ready to launch-ready.

gaps.gap: Rollback is documented but not acceptance-signed for live launch state.
gaps.reason: Rollback is documented but not acceptance-signed for live launch state.
gaps.dependency: Rollback coordinator and release owner signoff
gaps.recommendedResolution: Desk-check or rehearse deactivation/removal path for registry/runtime changes and obtain owner acceptance before launch decision.

gaps.dependency: Production authorization, validation evidence, observation closeout, rollback acceptance
gaps.recommendedResolution: Create final launch decision record summarizing approvals, evidence, risks, rollback, and protected-boundary verification.

gaps.gap: V578/V579 historical observations may confuse reviewers although V581/V582 resolved current artifact presence.
gaps.reason: V578/V579 historical observations may confuse reviewers although V581/V582 resolved current artifact presence.
gaps.recommendedResolution: Carry forward as resolved observation; do not rewrite prior artifacts unless separately requested.
